etf_proxy_annual_returns.coverage_applied: 2024 and 2025 proxy returns for remaining lazy-portfolio asset classes, plus 2023 for European Small Cap Value because the migrated series stopped in 2022: VTI, VV, VTV, VUG, VO, VOE, VOT, VB, VBK, VEA, VSS, VPL, BND, BNDX, BWX, SHY, IEF, TLT, TIP, VCSH, LQD, VCLT, HYG, VNQ, GLD, GLTR, DBC, BIL, QQQ, IWC, EFV, DFE, MUB, TFI

portfolio_structure.name: Original R PortfoliosStructure weights
portfolio_structure.coverage_applied: 2024 and 2025 derived lazy-portfolio returns are computed as sum(weight * asset return) when every component has a refreshed return

usd_ils.name: Bank of Israel daily representative USD/ILS exchange rates
usd_ils.coverage_applied: monthly last available daily rate through 2026-01

israel_cpi.name: Israel Central Bureau of Statistics CPI, series 120010
